title: Top 5 Men's Watches Under ₹5000 That Look Expensive
excerpt: Discover the best affordable luxury watches that will instantly elevate your wrist game.
content: A great watch is the anchor of a man's wardrobe, but you don't need a Rolex budget to look sophisticated. We've curated a list of stunning, high-quality timepieces that offer incredible value. Whether you prefer a clean minimalist dial or a rugged chronograph, these watches punch way above their weight class.

title: The Essential Shoes Every Man Needs in His Rotation
excerpt: From the boardroom to the weekend, these are the only footwear styles you actually need.
content: Footwear sets the tone for your entire outfit. If you build a rotation around a few versatile, high-quality pairs, you'll always be prepared. A sharp pair of leather oxfords covers your formal bases, while suede Chelsea boots seamlessly bridge the gap between smart and casual.
